title: [Bug]: Multiple "label!" filters for prune are ORed unlike all other filter combos which are ANDed.
body:

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

There seems to be no response on https://github.com/moby/moby/issues/40286 whether it's by design or a bug and afaict, podman would aim to maintain feature parity with docker so unless someone decides otherwise, this might not move unless there's movement further up.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
I think we should fix this for prune to match the other tools. Leave Docker to their bug.
@jakecorrenti Do you have any time for this?
Yep, I can take care of it
Hi, I've noticed that the multiple filters are Or'd for podman images as well. Should I raise a separate bug for that?
